title: user_management_search_and_edit_role
description: Test searching users by name or unit, editing a user's role, and verifying the updated role is reflected in the user list.

title: user_management_create_new_user_with_role
description: Test creating a new user with all required fields including role assignment, and verify the new user appears in the user list.

title: user_management_block_and_unblock_user
description: Test blocking a user and confirming the status changes to 'Blocked', then unblocking and verifying status reverts.

title: user_management_delete_user_with_reason_validation
description: Test deleting a user with and without providing a mandatory deletion reason, verifying validation error when reason is missing.

title: inspection_management_register_and_edit_inspection
description: Test registering a new inspection with details and photo, editing existing inspection fields, and verifying audit entries are recorded.

title: inspection_management_mark_completed_and_delete_validation
description: Test marking an inspection as completed and verifying status update, and test deletion with missing reason to trigger validation error.

title: password_recovery_request_and_reset_flow
description: Test requesting a password reset email with valid and unknown emails, and resetting password using valid and invalid/expired tokens.
